notes.title: Between Worlds, again
notes.body: Put on Between Worlds with the lights low. Sixty-five minutes of melodic house and techno for the hour when the day hasn't decided what it is yet. This is the set that keeps finding its way back into the room.

notes.title: Attention is the rarest currency
notes.body: Most platforms ask for your time. Almost none ask for your attention. A mix that asks you to stay until the end is a different kind of ask — slower, more honest. That is the standard 9bitts tries to hold.

notes.title: Light leaving the room
notes.body: Dusk is not a mood board. It is a temperature. Looking for photographs that feel like the last twenty minutes before night — floor, booth, haze, the quiet before the drop.

notes.title: Where the tracks come from
notes.body: Every set on this channel starts on Beatport. One track at a time, chosen for what it carries — not for what the algorithm suggests. If you buy music there through the Objects page, a small part helps keep this room open.
